rule: Parse ARNs with github.com/aws/aws-sdk-go-v2/aws/arn arn.Parse before applying policy checks
If any partition allow-list entries are present require arn.Partition to equal one of them
If any service allow-list entries are present require arn.Service to equal one of them
If any region allow-list entries are present require arn.Region to equal one of them
If any account ID allow-list entries are present require arn.AccountID to equal one of them
If any resource allow-list entries are present require arn.Resource to equal one of them
Allow-list flags are repeatable so admins can authorize multiple values per ARN component
If no allow-list entries are provided for a component then all values for that component are allowed
